args.query: SELECT * FROM tracks WHERE title LIKE '%Street Hype%' OR artist LIKE '%Brucqe Maginnis%' OR artist LIKE '%Bruce Maginnis%' OR title LIKE '%Brucqe Maginnis%' OR title LIKE '%Bruce Maginnis%'

args.query: SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) as total_revenue FROM sales WHERE track_id IN (7, 4122, 4628, 13758, 14080) GROUP BY store ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
